case_title: BRANDON DAVIS VS. BMT PROMOTIONS AND TALENT LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, BRANDON AS TO DEFENDANT BMT PROMOTIONS AND TALENT LLC A GEORGIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, BRANDON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BMT PROMOTIONS AND TALENT LLC A GEORGIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $3,958.48 PRINCIPAL, $6.31 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,189.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
